subcodes.first_line: The Wronged One remembereth thee from the precincts of the prison, and calleth to mind the days of thy presence before His countenance and thy standing at the gate [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یذکرک المظلوم من شطر السجن و یذکر ایام حضورک لدی الوجه و قیامک لدی الباب و
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God
